Avengers: Endgame (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $858,373,000Details
International Box Office $1,859,130,922
Worldwide Box Office $2,717,503,922
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $24,013,005
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $83,946,711
Total $107,959,716
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The grave course of events set in motion by Thanos that wiped out half the universe and fractured the Avengers ranks compels the remaining Avengers to take one final stand in Marvel Studios’ grand conclusion to twenty-two films, “Avengers: Endgame.”

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$357,115,007 (41.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$400,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,662 opening theaters/4,662 max. theaters, 8.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $1,120,757,762

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 26th, 2019 (Wide) by Walt Disney
April 26th, 2019 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
September 25th, 2026 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: April 23rd, 2019 (Limited) (China)
April 24th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
April 24th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
April 24th, 2019 (Wide) (China)
April 24th, 2019 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: July 30th, 2019 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi violence and action, and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2573 (Cert #52133), 4/10/2019)
Running Time: 181 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Avengers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Ensemble, Motion Capture Performance, Sequels Shot Concurrently

Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR

Synopsis

The grave course of events set in motion by Thanos that wiped out half the universe and fractured the Avengers ranks compels the remaining Avengers to take one final stand in Marvel Studios’ grand conclusion to twenty-two films, “Avengers: Endgame.”

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$357,115,007 (41.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$400,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,662 opening theaters/4,662 max. theaters, 8.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $1,120,757,762
